title: Orlan's Projection Sorcery
description: Projection Sorcery is a Fabric 1.21.1 PvP-focused ability mod with a two-phase system: you plan a high-speed route in frozen time, then replay it instantly with recorded attacks and combo scaling.
body:
**Arlo’s Projection Sorcery** is a Fabric PvP combat mod inspired by Naoya Zenin’s technique from JJK. It gives players a high-speed, frame-based ability where you enter a planning phase to map movement and attacks, then instantly replay that route at extreme velocity for burst damage and combo chains. The mod focuses on stylish “frozen time” gameplay with lock-on, freeze-frame effects, cinematic visuals/sound, and an Energy system that rewards precise execution and aggressive timing.
